payload.title: Verify n8n-mcp installation and system health
payload.description: 1. Verify n8n-mcp is installed: run 'npm list -g n8n-mcp' and confirm version. 2. Check if n8n server is installed: run 'npm list -g n8n'. 3. Verify Ollama models are responding: send test prompt to qwen2.5:7b. 4. Run ruff check on rudy/ package to confirm ruff is working. 5. Report findings back to alfred-inbox.
payload.context: Session 31 Robin training exercise. Alfred installed n8n-mcp (v2.42.3) and is installing n8n server. Ruff was already at v0.15.8 but Robin couldn't find it (PATH issue). Confirm everything works from Robin's environment.
payload.expected_output: JSON report with verification results for each check
